name: startup-playbook-advisor
description: Early-stage startup advisory skill for validating ideas before building.

interface.longDescription: Guides founders through early-stage idea validation, target user discovery, paid demand checks, MVP scope, pricing tests, and go-to-market planning using Startup Playbook evidence.
defaultPrompt: Help me validate a startup idea.
Ask me the key questions before I build.
Turn this idea into a 7-day validation plan.
